message:
feat(fp-columnar): expand ValidityMask surface (frankenpandas-dklr)

Adds eight ValidityMask helpers matching the pandas / numpy validity-
mask patterns the Column layer now expects:

- count_invalid — complement of count_valid.
- any / all — bitwise truthiness reductions; empty mask is all=true
  (vacuous), any=false.
- xor_mask — symmetric-difference bitwise XOR with tail-bit masking
  so unused trailing bits stay zero.
- slice(start, len) — clamped sub-range view copied into a new mask.
- concat(other) — append another mask's bits.
- first_valid / last_valid — positional scan for leading / trailing
  set bits.

Co-lands frankenpandas-i4x8 (xor_mask), gnjt (slice/concat),
f64w (first_valid/last_valid).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
